package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for route_registration_contains_business_logic: Router setup files that build queries, mutate models, or execute business actions while registering routes.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule151NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule151NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule151NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario151Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule151NegativeService, input Rule151NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
